hotel_name: Căn hộ cao cấp trong tòa nhà Sheraton - mặt biển (Luxury Apartment in Sheraton Building- Beach Front)

reviews.title: Never come back.
reviews.text: The interior is severely degraded, there are 3 televisions but 2 are broken, and the cleaning is very superficial.
reviews.response: We are so sorry about the bad experience that you have faced during your trip. Actually, the previous guest make damage the TVs inside the apartment and we not yet ordered on time the new TV that make you unhappy about it. Hopefully we will have another chance to welcome you back to the apartment

reviews.title: Rooms were comfortable and beds comfortable. Some other things that weren't so great.
reviews.positives: So this property listing was confusing a bit. The property is "Altara Suites" although the booking says "Luxury Apartment in Sheraton Building." It is essentially renting out an apartment building room. The room itself was comfortable, beds comfortable, bathrooms clean and comfortable. The host communicated with me through WhatsApp and was responsive.
reviews.negatives:
It is important for people to know when booking that access to the pool and the gym is NOT included in your booking. The photos in the listing led us to believe otherwise. You can access this, but you have to pay out of pocket. The elevators in this building were also atrocious. They took inordinately long to come and go, and the stairwell is dingy and dark and some floors with no lights and going through the stairwell feels like something out of a scary movie. Many floors are not very sound proof and there is a fair bit of smoke smell throughout the building. Although the rooms were clean, the rest of the building is not. Also the payment for this booking was not handled through booking.com but the host sent a messenger to collect the fee for the room the morning after we arrived. Note that they charge 3% extra to pay by credit card. 

All in all, don't expect this booking to be a hotel like stay, but more like an AirBnB style apartment building room.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: The facility was not up to standard. It was very dirty, bed was uncomfortable, shower was clogged. Bad experience

reviews.title: Excellent stay for a relaxing holiday.
reviews.positives: The apartment is high floor with good view of Da Nang beach. And it has complete facilities such as washing machine, microwave, kitchen, etc.
reviews.negatives: The lifts tend to be a little slow especially when there’re high number of users.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Place needs to update furniture. Unit has a smell... especially the restroom but owner brought an air purifier which helped alot.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: 立地がよく、コンドミニアムタイプで子連れに快適でした。洗濯機乾燥機もついていて便利でした。
reviews.negatives: 浴槽が汚かったので使用できなかった。

reviews.title: Mimi family holiday in Danang
reviews.text: The apartment is nice, good for a family with two children, two sleeping room and two bathrooms, kitchen and  washing machine and tumble dryer, space for eating and relaxing. nice swimming pool on the roof. close to the beach, only 5 minutes walking.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
강아지와 함께 숙박을 했습니다.
걱정을 너무 많이 했는데 너무 편하게 지내다가 왔습니다. 
호스트분들이 다 친절하세요.

숙소도 깨끗하고 세탁기와 건조기가 있어서 빨래 걱정도 없었습니다!
 
숙소 고민하고 계시다면 추천드려요

reviews.title: Apartment for small families
reviews.text: Nice apartment for 5 of us. But 1 thing about this room, they don’t allow us to use pool. There is pool on top of the apartment, but our room is not included  for the pool facilities. Like what in the world is that?

reviews.title: إقامة رائعة
reviews.positives: اشكر العاملين جميعا. كان تعاملهم جدا راقي ومتعاونين ويساعدون في كل شي. المكان قريب من كل شي ومن شاطي البحر. والشقة واسعة ونظيفة. شكرا

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
Overall, I was quite satisfied. The hotel is located right in front of the beach, so the view is great. However, it’s a bit far from popular restaurants in the city center, so I used Grab for transportation. Restaurants near the hotel tend to be relatively more expensive and, in my personal opinion, not as tasty as those in the city.

The best facility was definitely the washer and dryer, which made things very convenient. The only inconvenience I experienced was being assigned a different room than the one I booked, but after I filed a complaint, the host resolved the issue within two hours.

reviews.title: Lựa chọn hoàn hảo
reviews.positives: Căn hộ Gần trung tâm ,và bãi biển,căn hộ thật sự ấm áp,chủ nhà rất thân thiện và chào đón chúng tôi tại sảnh,giao tiếp thật sự ấn tượng,tôi sẽ giới thiệu chổ ở này cho bạn bè của tôi . tôi rất cảm cảm bạn chủ nhà hiếu khách.Tốt và đáng chia sẽ
reviews.negatives: Mọi thứ diễn ra rất tuyệt vời.

reviews.title: I'm very satisfied with the accommodation.
reviews.text: If you go to the entrance of Altara Suite, there is a separate apartment reception. During the day, they also take care of your luggage. It’s great for families, and we comfortably used it like our own home. The breakfast is truly limited in variety. If I had known it would be this way for the price of ##### won, I wouldn’t have used it... I recommend going to another hotel for breakfast.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Tôi thấy mọi thứ rất okie,phòng tắm rất to ,thoải mái,ấn tượng khi nhận phòng là rất sạch sẽ,cho 5*,

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: I went to Da Nang and this is my favorite place, the apartment is very spacious and fully equipped including a dryer. The host is friendly and communicates well. I will come back here next time.

reviews.title: Tôi sẽ quay lại nơi này
reviews.positives: Rất là sạch sẽ và đẹp , phòng rất sang và view đẹp

reviews.title: Great stay
reviews.text: Nice place, good view, and clean apartment. Will come back soon.

reviews.title: Советую апартаменты, мы оплачивали наличкой на месте, что удобно для нас россиян👐🏻
reviews.positives:
Супер уютный апартамент😍 Вид из окна хороший:вид на горы, город, море одновременно🫶🏻 До моря близко, рядом множество кафешек, магазинов. жили на 23 этаже, семья из 4-х человек. Для удобства имеются все необходимое! Стиральная машина, сушильная машина, чайник, посуда👍🏼 кровати мягкие👍🏼 кондиционер отлично охлаждает👌
Отдельное огромное спасибо стаффу Джину🫶🏻 (Jin) он помог нам купить билеты онлайн в Ба На Хиллз👐🏻всегда был на связи, на все вопросы давал советы👍🏼

reviews.title: An interesting destination for the family!
reviews.text: The host is wonderful, communicates well, and supported us from check-in to check-out. This is my second time in Da Nang and I chose this apartment again. I really like the space here. I recommend the friendliness of the host to customers looking for this place, it's a great choice for couples and families with small children. Thank you, Nghia.

reviews.title: Great two bedroom apartment across from Da Nang Beach
reviews.positives: For this two bedroom apartment the location across the road from beach was handy. There was a handy mart close, the bed rooms were spacious and with two bathroom areas we avoided bathroom congestion at key times. The AC worked well and the apartment was quiet with no noise issues. The side view of the beach was good too to see the people having a swim. The washer and dryer was amazing, once you worked it out, helping us catch up on same laundry to keep us going. The managers were prompt and helpful on WhatsApp.
reviews.negatives:
The apartment needs some maintenance (eg loose bedroom door handle, loose cupboard door hanging, loose sliding door handle to balcony, shower head leaking).
It also needs basic stock of cutlery - knives, forks, spoons, bottle opener - so you can enjoy take-a-way at home.

reviews.title: NIce place
reviews.text:
Good Place to stay.
Cozy, clean and spacious apartment 
Close to the beach

reviews.title: Great Vacation at Sheraton Building
reviews.positives: The facility was very good and the coordinator Hana was particularly very prompt and responsive
reviews.negatives: The picture of the property with the Swimming Pool was deceptive . It got us to believe that the facility was available to us. I believe pay and use facilities should be clearly spelt out .

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Great, suitable for family trips. The host is friendly, and the prices are reasonable compared to beachfront hotels. You can book rooms on Agoda with confidence; once payment is done, you will have the host's phone number to contact them. You can also leave your luggage at the lobby if you arrive early.

reviews.title: Great Place.
reviews.positives: The apartment was clean and had everything we needed. The bed was very comfortable. Our host was supper helpful and anything we needed they sorted. The gym was good with a great view but only one weights bench which is an issue if you want to use say the bench press and someone needs it for free weights. Dumbells from 1Kg to 30kg unusual for these types of places.
reviews.negatives: The building itself is looking tired. The lifts (elevators) you have to wait a very long time for. The pool and facilities are very old looking and worn. The cost for a month to use the gym is £70 per person and we paid for 2 which I though was expensive.

reviews.title: Very nice serviced apartment
reviews.text: Maybe the location is not the more central one, but everything is close, Grabb is not expensive, the views are really nice, and the cleaning service is good. Every day they change towels, garbage, and do a fast clean up. The washing machine and dryer is really good. If there is a problem they try to fix it as soon as possible.

reviews.title: tres mitigé
reviews.text: Énorme bâtiment en construction devant le balcon. Journées parfois avec trop de bruit. Piscine non gratuite (pas cette info sur le site), balcon très sale. tout le reste était parfait

reviews.title: In die Jahre gekommen
reviews.text: Leider ist das Apartment sehr in die Jahre gekommen und auf keinen Fall 5 Sterne wie außerhalb und im Gebäude angegeben. Wahrscheinlich war es mal früher so, jedoch jetzt eher 3 Sterne wie auch mittlerweile bei Agoda zu sehen und von anderen Gästen bewertet. Wer das Apartment zu einem günstigeren Preis bekommt, kann es gerne nehmen, andere Apartments sind oft viel schlimmer. Wer jedoch das Gym nutzen möchte, muss hier 200.000Dong pro Tag zahlen. Das Personal ist wie immer in Vietnam nett, jedoch wird die Sauberkeit wie auch in vielen anderen Apartments, nicht ganz so ernst genommen.
